about.title: About Us
about.heroDescription: {{siteName}} was founded with a simple belief: that every community deserves access to education, healthcare, and opportunity — regardless of geography or circumstance.
about.missionDesc: To empower underserved communities through transparent, accountable, and impactful philanthropic initiatives — ensuring every donated rupee or dollar reaches the people who need it most.
about.visionDesc: A world where access to education, clean water, nutrition, and healthcare is a reality for every child and family — not a privilege of geography or wealth.
about.valuesDesc: Transparency in every transaction. Accountability to our donors and beneficiaries. Partnership with local communities. Impact measured by lives changed, not funds raised.
about.howSubtitle: From your heart to the people who need it — a fully transparent process.
about.step1Desc: Browse our campaigns, pick a cause that resonates with you, and donate securely via Stripe. One-time or monthly — every contribution counts.
about.step2Desc: 100% of your donation goes directly to the campaign. Our team works with vetted local partners to execute the project with full documentation.
about.step3Desc: Real people receive real help. We report back with outcomes, photos, and impact data so you know exactly what your generosity achieved.
about.whereSubtitle: Currently focused on India and Ireland, with plans to expand responsibly.
about.indiaDesc: Education initiatives, school construction, scholarship programs for girls, nutrition projects, and clean water access in rural communities.
about.irelandDesc: Community development, social inclusion programs, and support for vulnerable families across urban and rural regions.
about.trustSecureDesc: All donations processed via Stripe — PCI-DSS compliant and fully encrypted.
about.trustNgoDesc: Legally registered non-governmental organisation with full statutory compliance.
about.trustFeesDesc: 100% of your donation reaches the campaign. We are volunteer-driven at the core.
about.trustReportsDesc: We publish annual impact reports detailing where every penny went and the outcomes achieved.
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse our active campaigns and support a cause that matters to you.
